title: Craftable End Stone│可合成末地石
description: Added End Stone recipe.│添加了末地石配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
End Stone can be crafted with cobblestone and popped chorus fruit. This is because chorus fruit, a plant native to the End, acts like an end-effect on cobblestone.│末地石可以用鵝卵石以及爆裂紫頌果合成。會這麼設計是因為紫頌果是末地的植物，有如給鵝卵石施加了一層末地的元素。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
